header.title: Better Communication Across Cultures at Work
header.subtitle: Helping international teams and local staff communicate effectively across cultures
header.description: Practical, discussion-based workshops that support communication and collaboration in international workplaces. I help teams work effectively across cultures, understand different communication styles, and recognise and respond to misunderstandings when they arise.

image.alt: Genevieve, intercultural communication trainer, smiling outdoors among spring blossoms

about.title: About
paragraphs: I am an intercultural trainer specialising in communication and collaboration in multicultural workplaces. I work in higher education and with companies. Through my teaching and training, I have gained valuable experience working with people from a wide range of cultural backgrounds.  My own experience of living and working in different countries further enriches this perspective.
My workshops are tailored, interactive and discussion-based and support participants in developing practical communication and soft skills for working across cultures.
My background includes a degree in psychology and sociology, a diploma in intercultural competence, and a Master's degree in Adult Learning in Global Change.

image.alt: Genevieve collaborating during a cross-cultural communication workshop in a modern office.

credentials.text: MA Adult Learning in Global Change

Teams made up of different nationalities
Companies working in an international business environment
Staff working with international clients or colleagues
Teams that want to improve collaboration and avoid misunderstandings
Team members interpret communication styles differently
Different expectations around feedback and participation
Collaboration is affected by unclear communication across cultures
